patches.hypothesis: The refined patch will address the root cause of the overfitting issue by handling all edge cases, including missing values and null references, and combining header values in a more robust manner.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method was not correctly combining multiple header values with the same name.

patches.hypothesis: The issue is related to the handling of multiple values for the same header. The code only takes the first value and ignores the rest.
patches.changes: + Added a loop to process all values for a header.
patches.diff: + Added a loop to process all values for a header.
